item.title: Walmart's 'small but mighty' waterproof Bluetooth speaker is on sale for $10, and it can play for 25 hours straight
item.description: This little speaker is a pint-sized powerhouse.

item.title: MongoDB just got a reality check from Wall Street
item.description: MongoDB reported fourth-quarter fiscal 2026 revenue of about $695.1 million, up 27% year over year, and non‑GAAP earnings of $1.65 a share, both ahead...
